title: MoreAdventures
description: Do you want new adventures? Downoald This mod and explore new dimension, new biomes and gather new resources
body:
!OLD AND BUGGY! NOT UPDATED!

A New Equipment Mod It Will Add Much More Tools, Armor and Wearpons 

IF YOU WANT TO GO TO THE NEW DIMENSION CRAFT DIMENSION OF DARKNESS PORTAL IGNITER AND PLACE DEEPSLATE LIKE OBSIDIAN IN NETHER PORTAL

Wearpons+ got renamed to BetterMinecraft and then to MoreAdventure

v. 1.16.3 (Miner Update) Release (Work in Progress), (Last Alpha was 1.4.3.1, and last Beta was 1.10)

Release!

On Forge and NeoForge

Images are in end of the description and all recipes on image tab

Maybe this mod will come out in Fabric and QuiltMC (if it will come out on that mod loaders, first will be fabric)

This Mod Adds

New Dimension with biomes and structures (Dimension of Darkness)

11 New Structures (2 of them in end and 3 of them in Dimension of Darkness)

5 New Mobs

Copper Equipment (Full)

Emerald Equipment (Full)

Amethyst Equipment (Full)

Carbon Equipment (Full)

Lapis Equipment

Ruby Equipment (Full)

Stone Armor (Full Stone Equipment)

Radioactive Equipment (armor wont be added)

Radioactive Ore, Gem and Block

Lapis Shears

New trees and items like fences etc.

Upgraded Diamond Sword

Ender Pickaxe

Dust Of Ender

New Radioactive Ore and Gems

Ender Ore and Block

Ruby, Ruby Ore and Block

Golden Pickaxe with Blaze Rod

Dark Gem

Dark Gem Ore & Block

Carbon Block & Ore

Iron, Netherite and Gold Battle Axes

Aria Math Music Disc (Working)

Dark Gem Sword and Axe

Jungle Music Disc

Prismarine Sword

4 New Biomes

Much New Trades in Village and New Profession (if he become expert rank it would be one of the best professions)

New Potion

New Picture (Paint)

A knife

Poisonous Apple

And 1 new Fluid

New Ores!

New wood pack!

New armor and wearpons (i couldnt fit wearpons)

New Mobs

Mod In-game name: BetterMinecraft

1.16.5 and1.17 Release Coming Soon!

We Write Wiki (you can join)

By DanyloKhit

-All Recipes at Image Tab*
